title: descriptor
text: descriptor A formal description of a component or entity used internally by Uniface to control the interface to that component or entity. Synonyms: signature General term for the type of information stored in ULANA/USYSANA (and onwards in the Uniface Runtime Repository [URR]). Currently there are two kinds of descriptors: entity descriptor and signature descriptor. Related Links entity descriptor A runtime object that describes a modeled entity. It is used when creating a table for the entity and when converting entity data between DBMS formats or XML formats. signature Description of the remote interface of a component or a modeled entity operation, which is used to access it at runtime. Signatures for Uniface components and modeled entity operations are automatically generated, but signatures for non-Uniface components that Uniface can call at runtime, must be explicitly defined.
